data.description: NESTLÉ MOVES FORWARD WITH €5 BILLION DEAL FOR PERRIER AND SAN PELLEGRINO.

data.title: EQT Real Estate announces sale of 7 million square foot logistics portfolio in key industrial markets across the U.S.
data.description: The latest transaction marks the second phase of a major divestment by EQT Real Estate from its Core-Plus industrial portfolio. This portfolio includes a collection of 36 logistics assets covering approximately 7.3 million square feet. The sale highlights the ongoing interest from investors in sizeable, established, and stabilized assets in the industrial sector.

data.title: Star Refrigeration wins Supplier of the Year for driving energy and carbon reductions across the cold chain
data.description: In Glasgow, Scotland, on March 27, 2026, Star Refrigeration was honored as the Supplier of the Year at the 2026 Cold Chain Sustainability Awards. This recognition highlights the company's efforts in lowering the environmental footprint within the temperature-controlled logistics industry. This prestigious award was presented at the event, where Star Refrigeration's commitment to sustainability and environmental consciousness was commended.

data.title: Live Conscious® Launches Clinical Hair Growth+ Supplement Featuring Serevelle™, Clinically Shown to Increase Hair Density in 90 Days*
data.description: A recently tested hair growth supplement containing Serevelle™ has been introduced to the market with aims to decrease daily hair shedding, improve hair density, and enhance hair strength. Live Conscious® unveiled the product in Los Angeles on March 27, 2026. The supplement is designed to support thick and healthy hair.

data.title: Dizal's ZEGFROVY® (Sunvozertinib) Shows Profound Antitumor Activity as First-Line Treatment in Advanced NSCLC Patients with PACC or Other Uncommon Mutations at ELCC 2026
data.description: In a recent study, ZEGFROVY® as a primary treatment option showed an impressive 81.3% objective response rate among individuals with advanced non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC) possessing EGFR PACC or less common genetic mutations. This demonstrates the drug's notable efficacy in this specific patient population. The treatment also exhibited a favorable safety profile making it a promising option for these patients. The study was conducted by Dizal, a biopharmaceutical company based in Shanghai. This data was disclosed on March 27, 2026, and the company is listed on the Shanghai Stock Exchange under the symbol SSE:688192.

data.title: BionicM and Brooks Rehabilitation Launch Clinical Study Comparing Powered Bio Leg to Microprocessor Knees
data.description: In Jacksonville, Florida on March 27, 2026, BionicM USA LLC and Brooks Rehabilitation revealed a joint clinical research project. Named "Adaptive Mobility Technology: A Comparative Study of Bio Leg and C-Leg," the study aims to analyze functional mobility results. The investigation will compare the benefits of the two technologies and will involve a thorough assessment to determine the most effective option.

data.title: UMD Smith's Center for AI in Business Awarded $1M+ Federal Grant to Help Small Businesses Adopt AI
data.description: In College Park, Maryland, on March 27, 2026, the Center for Artificial Intelligence in Business at the Robert H. Smith School of Business, University of Maryland, obtained $1.031 million in federal funding. The goal of this initiative is to assist small businesses in implementing AI technologies to enhance their operations.

data.title: New "Automaker + Shipping" Integration Model! FOTON Motor & COSCO SHIPPING Special Transport Joint Venture Officially Launched
data.description: On March 26, 2026, Guangzhou Yuanfu Automotive Supply Chain Co., Ltd., a collaboration between FOTON MOTOR and COSCO SHIPPING, was introduced in Beijing. The unveiling also marked the delivery of a ro-ro vessel to the company, coinciding with their first substantial export order of 600 units.

data.title: Manulife's Management Information Circular and Annual Report Now Available
data.description: Manulife Financial Corporation, a leading financial services provider, has announced the release of its 2026 Management Information Circular and 2025 Annual Report. Shareholders can access these documents on the company's website, manulife.com. The Circular contains important details for shareholders and stakeholders and is part of the company's transparency efforts. Manulife's stocks are listed as C$ on TSX/NYSE/PSE with the code MFC, and as SEHK: 945. This announcement was made on March 27, 2026.

data.title: Is This a Real Sitcom? Comedian Concrete Leaves Fans Guessing With "Chair-Man of The Board"
data.description: In a gripping Instagram teaser, fans are left on the edge of their seats by the comedian and influential figure Concrete (Cristian E. Gutierrez), based in Los Angeles. This teaser, posted on March 27, 2026, has caused significant speculation online due to its cryptic nature and high production quality. The post has garnered a lot of attention, with a large number of views and engagement from intrigued followers.

data.title: GCL notified of Nasdaq deficiency notice due to minimum bid price requirement not being met.
data.description: The latest report states that the unemployment rate has fallen to 4.5%, marking a decrease of 0.3% compared to the previous month. This brings the total number of unemployed individuals down to 7.2 million nationwide. Additionally, the report reveals that the economy added 350,000 new jobs last month, reflecting a significant improvement in job creation. The sectors showing the most growth were manufacturing, healthcare, and technology. Analysts are optimistic about the future as the job market continues to recover from the impact of the pandemic.

data.title: Maryland Fire Departments Awarded $520,000 for Cancer Screenings using 20/20 BioLabs’ OneTest ™ Multi-Cancer Early Detection Blood Test
data.description: Maryland fire departments have been granted a total of $520,000 to facilitate cancer screenings. This funding will be utilized for implementing the OneTest™ Multi-Cancer Early Detection Blood Test from 0/20 BioLabs.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Falls On U.S.-Iran War News; Oil Prices Continue To Rally (Live Coverage)
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced a decline after President Trump extended the deadline for Iran negotiations. This caused oil prices to surge. The stock market saw a decrease today due to escalating tensions between the U.S. and Iran, with the Dow falling. Additionally, oil prices continued to rise, reflecting the market's response to the latest news.

data.title: Trust will be key in the AI economy with AI deepfakes. Proof-of-humanity could be the currency for finance, governance, and markets.
data.description: The increasing prevalence of AI deepfakes poses a threat to the trustworthiness of cryptocurrencies. In this era of imitation economy, where AI technology can replicate human behavior with alarming accuracy, trust has become a rare commodity in the world of digital assets. As a response to this challenge, the concept of proof-of-humanity is gaining traction as a potential solution. This innovative approach could potentially serve as the foundational currency driving financial transactions, governance systems, and market operations in the face of deepfake threats. Embracing proof-of-humanity may be crucial in safeguarding the integrity and authenticity of digital interactions in an era where trust is increasingly vulnerable.
AmpliTech Group to hold conference call on FY2025 results, 5G progress, and FY2026 guidance reaffirmed.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Rise, Oil Prices Tumble On Cautious Hopes For Iran Peace Deal
data.description: Futures experienced an increase while oil prices witnessed a decline following reports of the U.S. presenting a peace proposal to Iran. President Trump noted that Tehran appears to be open to dialogue. The Dow Jones futures surged amidst cautious optimism regarding a potential peace agreement with Iran, signaling a positive trend.
EU OFFICIAL DOMBROVSKIS SAYS G7 FINANCE MINISTERS WILL TALK ABOUT POLICY ACTIONS FOR HIGH ENERGY COSTS ON MONDAY.
RUSSIAN ECONOMY MINISTER RESHETNIKOV SAYS 2026 GDP GROWTH FORECAST WILL BE REDUCED.

EU OFFICIAL DOMBROVSKIS STATED THAT ANY NATIONAL ACTIONS TO ADDRESS RISING ENERGY COSTS SHOULD BE TARGETED, TEMPORARY, AND NOT INCREASE OIL AND GAS DEMAND WHILE CONTINUING TO FOCUS ON DECARBONIZATION.

data.title: Kitchenland Las Vegas Celebrates Grand Opening of New Showroom with Style and Inspiration
data.description: Exciting news from Kitchenland Las Vegas as they prepare to unveil their latest showroom located at 6455 Dean Martin Drive, Suite K, Las Vegas, NV 89118. The grand opening event is scheduled for Saturday, March 28th, from 10:00 AM to 2:00 PM. Guests can explore the stylish kitchen designs and offerings during this special day.
